method.geography_buckets: east/west Cascade side plus elevation bands (low <500m, mid 500-1200m, high >1200m, unknown)
notes: Based on iNaturalist research-grade flowering annotations in Washington.
Observation effort is uneven across regions and species.
Cascade split uses a coarse longitude approximation.
Missing elevations are estimated from SRTM90m DEM via OpenTopoData and cached.

overall.interpretation: Flowering is trending earlier than the 2017-2025 baseline.

current_year_observations.place_guess: Columbia River Gorge National Scenic Area, Lyle, WA, US
